message:
feat: enhance history subcommand with session timeline and storage improvements

Expand the br CLI's history capabilities and underlying infrastructure:

history.rs (137 lines changed):
- Add rich session timeline display showing per-session bead lifecycle
  events (created, status transitions, closed) with timestamps
- Implement chronological event ordering across multiple sessions
- Add colored output formatting for different event types
- Include session metadata (duration, bead counts) in timeline view

cli/mod.rs:
- Register new history subcommand variants and argument parsing
- Wire up timeline display mode to command dispatch

main.rs:
- Add top-level routing for enhanced history command options
- Handle new --timeline and --session flags

storage/sqlite.rs:
- Add query methods for session-scoped bead event retrieval
- Optimize history queries with indexed timestamp lookups
- Support filtered queries by session ID and date range

Also updates Cargo.lock for dependency changes and syncs
.beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
